description: Full portable catalog aligned with docs/features/DEFAULT_TEMPLATES_SEED.md. 17 General templates + 13 language vocabulary layouts. English (d479) and Japanese (d480) templateIds match lib/core/default_template_library_ids.dart. Block types include quiz/audio/image (see FlashcardDriftMapper). For image/audio blocks, optional configJson.previewSampleMediaKey selects bundled preview media (image_chem, audio_male, audio_female); see template_preview_asset_media.dart. Block configJson may include previewSampleText (library preview copy) and previewSampleMediaKey; stripped when duplicating to My Templates.

templates.name: Basic Q&A
templates.description: Question and answer with optional extra notes.

blocks.label: Answer
blocks.configJson: {"multiline":true,"appendMode":"newline","previewSampleText":"Plants use chlorophyll to convert light, water, and CO₂ into sugars and oxygen."}

blocks.label: Extra Notes
blocks.configJson: {"multiline":true,"previewSampleText":"Occurs mainly in chloroplasts; rate varies with light intensity and CO₂."}

templates.name: Concept Breakdown
templates.description: Concept, explanation, example, and key takeaways.

blocks.label: Explanation
blocks.configJson: {"multiline":true,"appendMode":"newline","previewSampleText":"Net movement of water across a semipermeable membrane from high to low water potential."}

blocks.label: Example
blocks.configJson: {"multiline":true,"previewSampleText":"\"Placing a raisin in water: water enters the cells and they swell.\""}

blocks.label: Key Takeaways
blocks.configJson: {"multiline":true,"previewSampleText":"Passive transport · No ATP; driven by concentration gradient."}

templates.name: Sentence Practice
templates.description: Sentence, translation, grammar notes, alternate phrasing.

blocks.label: Sentence
blocks.configJson: {"multiline":true,"appendMode":"newline","previewSampleText":"She decided to take the train instead of driving."}

blocks.label: Translation
blocks.configJson: {"multiline":true,"appendMode":"newline","previewSampleText":"Elle a décidé de prendre le train au lieu de conduire."}

blocks.label: Grammar Notes
blocks.configJson: {"multiline":true,"previewSampleText":"au lieu de + infinitive · agreement of past participle with feminine subject (optional in speech)."}

blocks.label: Alternate phrasing
blocks.configJson: {"multiline":true,"previewSampleText":"\"She chose to take the train rather than drive.\""}

templates.name: Problem Solving
templates.description: Problem, solution, steps or explanation.

blocks.label: Problem
blocks.configJson: {"multiline":true,"appendMode":"newline","previewSampleText":"The app crashes when users tap Save on slow networks."}

blocks.label: Solution
blocks.configJson: {"multiline":true,"appendMode":"newline","previewSampleText":"Add a timeout, show retry UI, and queue saves offline until sync succeeds."}

blocks.label: Steps / Explanation
blocks.configJson: {"multiline":true,"previewSampleText":"1) Reproduce with throttled network 2) Log request timing 3) Ship fix behind flag."}

templates.name: Fact Card
templates.description: Topic, key fact, context, extra details.

blocks.label: Key Fact
blocks.configJson: {"multiline":true,"appendMode":"newline","previewSampleText":"About 97% of Earth’s water is in oceans; under 3% is freshwater."}

blocks.label: Context / Story
blocks.configJson: {"multiline":true,"previewSampleText":"\"Most freshwater is locked in ice caps and glaciers.\""}

blocks.label: Extra Details
blocks.configJson: {"multiline":true,"previewSampleText":"Useful for env science decks; numbers vary slightly by source."}

templates.name: Fill in the Blank
templates.description: Cloze-style sentence, answer, explanation.

blocks.label: Sentence with ___
blocks.configJson: {"multiline":true,"appendMode":"newline","previewSampleText":"The mitochondrion is often called the ___ of the cell."}

blocks.label: Explanation
blocks.configJson: {"multiline":true,"previewSampleText":"Produces ATP via cellular respiration; has its own circular DNA."}

templates.name: Prompt Card
templates.description: Speaking or recall prompt with suggested answer.

blocks.label: Prompt / Topic
blocks.configJson: {"multiline":true,"appendMode":"newline","previewSampleText":"Explain the difference between correlation and causation in one paragraph."}

blocks.label: Suggested Answer / Notes
blocks.configJson: {"multiline":true,"previewSampleText":"Correlation: variables move together. Causation: one variable directly produces change in another. Confounding factors can create misleading correlations."}

templates.name: Interview Prep
templates.description: Interview question, ideal answer, tips.

blocks.label: Question
blocks.configJson: {"multiline":true,"appendMode":"newline","previewSampleText":"Tell me about a time you disagreed with a teammate. What did you do?"}

blocks.label: Ideal Answer
blocks.configJson: {"multiline":true,"appendMode":"newline","previewSampleText":"Situation: tight deadline conflict. Action: listened, documented tradeoffs, proposed experiment. Result: shipped on time with shared ownership."}

blocks.label: Tips / Variations
blocks.configJson: {"multiline":true,"previewSampleText":"Use STAR; quantify outcome; show empathy and follow-through."}

templates.name: Reading Notes
templates.description: Idea or quote, explanation, personal notes.

blocks.label: Idea / Quote
blocks.configJson: {"maxLength":80,"previewSampleText":"\"We see the world not as it is, but as we are.\""}

blocks.label: Explanation / Insight
blocks.configJson: {"multiline":true,"appendMode":"newline","previewSampleText":"The author argues perception is filtered through habits, biases, and prior experience—so two people rarely share the same “facts.”"}

blocks.label: Personal Notes
blocks.configJson: {"multiline":true,"previewSampleText":"Connect to your own study habits: confirmation bias when reviewing flashcards."}

templates.name: Term + Usage
templates.description: Term, definition, example usage, memory notes.

blocks.label: Definition
blocks.configJson: {"multiline":true,"appendMode":"newline","previewSampleText":"the occurrence of pleasant or useful things by chance"}

blocks.label: Example usage
blocks.configJson: {"multiline":true,"previewSampleText":"\"Finding that paper was pure serendipity—I wasn’t even searching for it.\""}

blocks.label: Notes / Memory aid
blocks.configJson: {"multiline":true,"previewSampleText":"Coined by Horace Walpole (1754) from a Persian fairy tale."}

templates.name: Classic Q&A
templates.description: Question on the front; tap to reveal the answer on the back — no answer peek on the front.

templates.name: Vocabulary Premium
templates.description: Word and pronunciation on the front; meaning, example, and hidden notes on the back.

blocks.label: Meaning
blocks.configJson: {"multiline":true,"appendMode":"newline","previewSampleText":"showing great attention to detail; very careful and precise"}

blocks.label: Example
blocks.configJson: {"multiline":true,"previewSampleText":"\"She kept meticulous notes for every experiment.\""}

templates.name: Active Recall
templates.description: Prompt on the front; type your answer on the back, then reveal the correct answer and extra notes.

blocks.label: Question
blocks.configJson: {"maxLength":120,"previewSampleText":"In one sentence, what is the function of RNA polymerase?"}

blocks.label: Your answer
blocks.configJson: {"question":"Type what you recall (one short sentence).","correctAnswer":"It synthesizes RNA from a DNA template during transcription.","caseSensitive":false,"isQuiz":true}

blocks.label: Reveal / notes
blocks.configJson: {"multiline":true,"previewSampleText":"Enzyme that synthesizes RNA from a DNA template during transcription."}

templates.name: Multiple Choice Learning
templates.description: Topic or prompt on the front; multiple choice on the back with optional explanation.

blocks.label: Choose answer
blocks.configJson: {"options":["Long-term retention with fewer reviews","Short-term cramming only","Faster deck creation"],"correctAnswerIndex":0,"question":"What does spaced repetition optimize?","isQuiz":true}

blocks.label: Explanation
blocks.configJson: {"multiline":true,"previewSampleText":"Intervals grow when you answer correctly; they shrink after mistakes (typical SM-2 style)."}

templates.name: Concept Learning
templates.description: Concept on the front; explanation, divider, example, and hidden notes on the back.

blocks.label: Explanation
blocks.configJson: {"multiline":true,"appendMode":"newline","previewSampleText":"Short-term system for holding and manipulating a small amount of information during reasoning."}

blocks.label: Example
blocks.configJson: {"multiline":true,"previewSampleText":"\"Trying to mental-multiply while listening to a lecture taxes working memory.\""}

blocks.label: Extra notes
blocks.configJson: {"multiline":true,"previewSampleText":"Often linked to 7±2 chunks (Miller); modern models use duration limits too."}

templates.name: Visual Learning
templates.description: Image on the front; title and hidden details on the back — anatomy, maps, diagrams, UI.

blocks.label: Details
blocks.configJson: {"multiline":true,"previewSampleText":"Six carbon aromatic ring; delocalized π electrons (resonance). Common in organic chemistry."}

templates.name: Listening Practice
templates.description: Audio on the front; type what you heard on the back, then reveal transcript or notes.

blocks.label: What did you hear?
blocks.configJson: {"question":"Type what you heard (or a short summary).","correctAnswer":"The train leaves at seven fifteen.","caseSensitive":false,"isQuiz":true}

blocks.label: Transcript / notes
blocks.configJson: {"multiline":true,"previewSampleText":"Transcript: “The train leaves at seven fifteen.” Adjust wording if you paraphrased."}
